description: You are a researcher preparing to deploy to Palmer Station, Antarctica. Reconfigure GPredict for your Antarctic field season by adding ground stations for Palmer_Station (64.7743°S, 64.0539°W, 10m altitude) and Punta_Arenas (53.1548°S, 70.9113°W, 37m altitude). Create a module named PalmerComms for amateur radio satellite communication containing ISS (NORAD 25544), SO-50 (NORAD 27607), and AO-85 (NORAD 40967), configured to use Palmer_Station for pass predictions. Create a second module named PalmerWX for NOAA weather satellite APT imagery reception containing NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), and NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), also configured for Palmer_Station. Set Palmer_Station as GPredict's default ground station. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open with the default Pittsburgh configuration.
